articles.author: Sangmi Cha
articles.title: South Korea Overtakes India as World’s Sixth-Largest Stock Market - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: South Korea’s equity market has overtaken India’s as the world’s sixth largest, driven by a relentless surge in chip heavyweights powering the global artificial intelligence buildout.
articles.content:
South Koreas equity market has overtaken Indias as the worlds sixth largest, driven by a relentless surge in chip heavyweights powering the global artificial intelligence buildout.
